channel.title: Chrome-Extension on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Chrome-Extension on Arrans github.io

item.title: requestly/requestly
item.description: Local-first Developer Tool to Build, Test, Intercept & Mock API Requests. Requestly is a combination of REST API Client and HTTP Interceptor. It is simple, beautiful and powerful alternative to Postman, Insomnia, Bruno and Charles Proxy.

item.title: pbek/QOwnNotes
item.description: QOwnNotes is a plain-text file notepad and todo-list manager with Markdown support and Nextcloud / ownCloud integration.

item.title: floccusaddon/floccus
item.description: ☁️ Sync your bookmarks privately across browsers and devices

item.title: dvcol/synology-download
item.description: Synology Download Station browser extension built with React.

item.title: rossmoody/svg-gobbler
item.description: Open source browser extension for finding, editing, exporting, optimizing, and managing SVG content.
